working: Submission brief: paste brief → Find Matches → ref tracks + demo matches + Mozart take
POST /analyze-submission-brief: Haiku extracts requirements (bpm/energy/key), scores ref tracks and demos
POST /save-submission-brief: writes brief.txt to Dropbox submission folder on send
Brief stored per-patch in memory (patchBriefs map), survives modal close until patch is sent
All 8 press feeds working (NME, Consequence, The Guardian, Earmilk, Uproxx, A&R Factory, Pitchfork, Bedroom Producers)
chokidar ignoreInitial:true — no dupe storm on restart
notes: Demo matching in /analyze-submission-brief relies on songs having work_data.versions[].analysis (from Essentia analysis). Songs without analysis won't appear in matches. Brief txt is only saved when sendPatch() is called (not on createPatch).
